     The Numbers Business Report

Life of the Party (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $53,059,911Details
International Box Office $12,600,000
Worldwide Box Office $65,659,911
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,166,893
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,742,245
Total $8,909,138
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When her husband suddenly dumps her, longtime dedicated housewife Deanna turns regret into re-set by going back to college…landing in the same class and school as her daughter, who’s not entirely sold on the idea. Plunging headlong into the campus experience, the increasingly outspoken Deanna—now Dee Rock—embraces freedom, fun and frat boys on her own terms, finding her true self in a senior year no one ever expected.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,886,075 (33.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:80.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,656 opening theaters/3,656 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $69,659,334

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 11th, 2018 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 10th, 2018 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
May 11th, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
May 11th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
May 11th, 2018 (Wide) (New Zealand)
June 29th, 2018 (Wide), released as El alma de la fiesta (Mexico)
Video Release: July 24th, 2018 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual material, drug content and partying.
(Rating bulletin 2480 (Cert #51072), 6/14/2017)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Delayed Adulthood, Dysfunctional Family, Mid-Life Crisis, Relationships Gone Wrong
Social setting: Adult Education, College
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, On The Day Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When her husband suddenly dumps her, longtime dedicated housewife Deanna turns regret into re-set by going back to college…landing in the same class and school as her daughter, who’s not entirely sold on the idea. Plunging headlong into the campus experience, the increasingly outspoken Deanna—now Dee Rock—embraces freedom, fun and frat boys on her own terms, finding her true self in a senior year no one ever expected.
